assets.title: Chipotle Mexican Grill
assets.source: Chipotle Mexican Grill. Photo via Shutterstock.

author: Shivani Kumaresan
teaser: Raymond James analyst Brian M. Vaccaro reiterates an Outperform rating on Chipotle Mexican Grill, raising the price target from $67 to $70. Despite viral social media posts and a softer consumer backdrop, Chipotle maintains strong comp and traffic performance, driven by its value proposition and operational improvements.
teaserText: Raymond James analyst Brian M. Vaccaro reiterates an Outperform rating on Chipotle Mexican Grill, raising the price target from $67 to $70. Despite viral social media posts and a softer consumer backdrop, Chipotle maintains strong comp and traffic performance, driven by its value proposition and operational improvements.
title: Chipotle Mexican Grill's Pricing Study Affirms Strong Value Proposition, Says Analyst

teaser: Alumis priced its IPO at $16/share, raising $210 million with 13.13 million shares. Trading begins June 28, 2024. Alumis develops oral therapies for immune-mediated diseases, with its lead candidate ESK-001 targeting psoriasis and lupus.
